name: NewtekOne, Inc.
business: NewtekOne, Inc. is a financial holding company that provides business and financial solutions, including lending, payments, insurance, and payroll services, to the independent business owner (SMB) market. Its technology platform, NewTracker, and Newtek Advantage portal enable client acquisition and service delivery without traditional bank branches or bankers.

exposures.sentence: NewTracker is our patented prospect management technology software, which is similar to, but we believe better suited for our needs than, the system popularized by Salesforce.com and similar providers.

We offer the Newtek Advantage (patent pending), the One Dashboard for All of Your Business Needs , which we believe is a differentiating business tool that business owners can use in one or more areas of their core business operations.

Newtek Insurance Agency (NIA), a wholly-owned subsidiary, is a retail and wholesale brokerage insurance agency licensed in all 50 states, specializing in the sale of commercial and health/benefits lines insurance products to independent business owners, as well as the sale of various personal lines of insurance.
NMS markets credit and debit card processing services, check approval services, ACH services, processing equipment, and software.

PMT d/b/a Newtek Payroll and Benefits Solutions, is a wholly-owned subsidiary which offers an array of industry standard and competitively priced payroll management, and related payment and tax reporting services to independent business owners.

Newtek Bank originates, services and sells SBA 7(a) loans in a similar manner to NSBF s historic business model and originates and services SBA 504 loans, C&I loans (including ABL), and owner occupied CRE and investor CRE loans.

catalysts.event: Divestiture of Newtek Technology Solutions (NTS) to Intelligent Protection Management Corp.
catalysts.sentence: On January 2, 2025, we completed the divestiture of our wholly-owned subsidiary Newtek Technology Solutions, Inc. (NTS) to IPM .
On March 19, 2025, the Company closed an exempt offering of $30.0 million in aggregate principal amount of its 2030 Notes.

catalysts.event: Securitization of $216.6 million ALP loans (2025-1 Trust)
catalysts.sentence: On April 23, 2025, the Company closed a securitization backed by $216.6 million of ALP loans.

catalysts.event: Repayment of NMS Webster Note in full
catalysts.sentence: On September 26, 2025, the NMS Webster Note was repaid in full.
On September 26, 2025, NMS entered into the Goldman Facility.

catalysts.event: Exchange of $20.0 million 2026 Notes for 2030 Notes
catalysts.sentence: On October 21, 2025, the Company entered into agreements with two institutional investors that were existing holders of the Company s 2026 Notes to exchange the $20.0 million in total principal amount of the Company s 2026 Notes held by such investors for an equal principal amount of the Company s 2030 Notes.

tamClaims.claim: The U.S. independent business owner/SMB market includes 36.2 million businesses.
tamClaims.sentence: According to a 2025 Small Business Profile published by the SBA, the U.S. independent business owner/SMB market includes 36.2 million businesses.
